response.global_summary: The video begins with the virtual character Kureiji Ollie presenting various merchandise items, followed by a transition to a musical performance of the song "LoveIt?" by biz and ZERA, performed by Ollie.

scenes.description: Kureiji Ollie presents merchandise, including a rubber mat, cushion, ring necklace, mug, and voice pack.
Kureiji Ollie performs the song "LoveIt?" on a stage with a virtual background. The song title and credits appear on-screen.

I love that face you make when terrified
That body of yours, want it so badly to be mine, oh
Love it?

High.
